# comfyui_workspace_json (Data Source)

Imports and normalizes native ComfyUI workspace or subgraph JSON from a file path or raw JSON string.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `json` (String) Optional raw ComfyUI workspace or subgraph JSON string.
- `path` (String) Optional file path to load workspace JSON from.

### Read-Only

- `group_count` (Number) Number of groups in the imported workspace.
- `node_count` (Number) Number of nodes in the imported workspace.
- `normalized_json` (String) Normalized ComfyUI workspace or subgraph JSON.
- `subgraph_count` (Number) Number of subgraph definitions in the imported workspace.
